title: Returns & Refund Policy
intro: Your satisfaction is our priority. Please review our return and refund guidelines below.
policies: We do not issue cash refunds or exchanges on opened products
Defective or incorrect products must be reported within 48 hours of delivery
Photo or video evidence is required for all claims
Approved claims are refunded as loyalty points (store credit)
Unopened items may be returned within 7 days for store credit
Contact support@yellowleaf.club or WhatsApp for all return inquiries
